<!--
Thanks for contributing to undoverse.in!
Fill out the sections below. Delete any that genuinely don't apply.
-->

## What does this PR do?

<!-- A clear, concise description of the change and the motivation behind it. -->

## Type of change

<!-- Tick all that apply. -->

- [ ] Feature (new functionality)
- [ ] Bugfix (fixes an issue)
- [ ] Chore (tooling, deps, refactor with no behavior change)
- [ ] Docs (documentation only)

## Testing done

<!--
How did you verify this works? Include commands run, environments tested
(local / preview / staging), and any manual QA steps.
-->

## Screenshots / recordings

<!-- Required if there are UI changes. Before/after is ideal. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`pnpm test`)
- [ ] Types pass (`pnpm typecheck`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`pnpm lint`)
- [ ] Documentation updated (if behavior or setup changed)
- [ ] No stray `console.log` / debug statements left in
- [ ] Accessibility checked (keyboard nav, contrast, semantics) for UI changes
- [ ] Database migrations included and reviewed (if schema changed)

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. Closes #123, Relates to #456 -->
